title: To-do Lists
bodyHtml:
The To-do app is where you keep track of everything you need to get done.

Creating a list

  1. Open the 📋 To-do app
  2. Tap + New List
  3. Tap the title to rename it
  4. Start adding tasks

Adding tasks

Type in the Add a to-do… input at the bottom of your list and tap Add (or press Enter).

Checking things off

Tap the checkbox next to a task. It feels good, trust us.

Due dates

Tap the 📅 icon next to a task to set a due date. Once set, the date appears as a small badge on the task — overdue dates are highlighted. Tap the badge to change or clear the date.

Other things you can do

  • Rename a list or task — tap the title or task text to edit it inline
  • Delete a task — tap the ✕ button next to it (you'll be asked to confirm)
  • Delete a list — tap the 🗑 icon (you'll be asked to confirm)
  • Change the list color — tap the colored circle next to the list to pick a new color

Importing a How To list

Some How To articles come with a ready-made to-do list. When you see one, tap "Add to My Locker" and a personal copy will appear in your To-do app — edit it however you want.
description: How to use the To-do app: creating lists, adding tasks, and importing How To checklists.
